steps_completed.task: Create ResolveMarketPanel.test.tsx: mock useResolveMarket and useSession. Test guard clauses (resolved shows summary, non-active/closed returns null, no accountId returns null), outcome selection, two-step confirmation flow, mutation success/error states, confirming reset on outcome change.

Create ConditionalEditor.test.tsx: mock useSession, useProbabilityEdit, useMarkets. Test unconfigured session placeholder, outcome selection and probability slider, add/remove context rows, ContextRow market→outcome cascade with disabled state, form submission with correct payload structure, conditional vs unconditional button text/styling, mutation success/error states.

Create VariableRow.test.tsx: mock useMarket, useSession, useProbabilityEdit. Wrap in AssumptionProvider. Test null return when data not loaded, market title and outcome probability bars, assume/unassume toggling, inline edit flow, target market styling differences, mutation payload includes contextPayload from AssumptionContext, success/error states.
Run all three test files with vitest to verify they pass. Fixed VariableRow test data to align market id/variableId for assumption context compatibility.
